recap: Created rtk-can-rewrite autoload function with built-in rewrite + TOML filter fallback; deleted stale hook test
Replaced rtk rewrite call in preToolUse-Bash-rtk with rtk-can-rewrite delegation via RTK_CAN_REWRITE_CMD; updated tests to use env var mocks with sentinel for idempotency
Replaced rtk bats with bats in CLAUDE.md, zsh-writer SKILL.md, and testing.md; updated GLOSSARY Relationships to reference rtk-can-rewrite instead of rtk rewrite
Added TAP plan line pattern to strip_lines_matching so on_empty fires correctly; added integration tests using XDG_CONFIG_HOME to isolate worktree config
